title: corgi-compose.yml
description: Schema for corgi-compose.yml, the configuration file for the corgi CLI (databases, services and required tools spun up from one file).

name.description: Human-readable name of this corgi project.

description.description: Short description of what this corgi project sets up.

init.description: Top-level commands run once during corgi init.

beforeStart.description: Top-level commands run consecutively before services start.

start.description: Top-level commands run in parallel on start.

afterStart.description: Top-level commands run consecutively after the CLI exits.

envTiers.description: Named env tiers selected by `corgi run --tier`. Each picks the env dir feeding services, a default dbServices selection, and whether to confirm before running.

dir.description: Root dir for per-service env lookup: <dir>/<service>.env.

dbServices.description: Default --dbServices for this tier (e.g. "none" to skip local dbs). Overridden by an explicit --dbServices.

confirm.description: Prompt before running this tier (e.g. prod). Bypassed with --yes.

services.description: Map of service name to its definition.

db_services.description: Map of database service name to its definition.

required.description: Map of required tool name to its definition.

service.description: A runnable service (local path or cloned repo).

service_name.description: Override name (normally the map key is used).

path.description: Path to the project repo. Defaults to the corgi-compose.yml directory.

ignore_env.description: If true, corgi does not touch the service's env file.

manualRun.description: If true, only runs when explicitly passed via --services.

cloneFrom.description: Git URL to clone the service from.

branch.description: Git branch to check out after cloning.

environment.description: Env vars copied into the service env file.

envPath.description: Path to the .env file in the target repo. Defaults to .env.

copyEnvFromFilePath.description: Path to an .env whose content is copied into the service .env. If missing, falls back to the service repo's .env-example / .env.example.

envPlaceholdersToCheck.description: Tokens that mark unfilled values; corgi warns (does not fail) when the resolved env still contains any of them.

localhostNameInEnv.description: Localhost name used in the env file. Defaults to localhost.

port.description: Service port added to the env file.

portAlias.description: Env var name for the port. Defaults to PORT.

depends_on_services.description: Other services this service depends on.

depends_on_db.description: Database services this service depends on.

exports.description: Whitelist of env vars exported to dependents.

beforeStart.description: Commands run consecutively before start. Each entry is a string, or an object {run, cacheKey} where cacheKey lists files whose unchanged hash lets corgi skip that step (--no-cache forces run).

cacheKey.description: Files (relative to the service dir) whose combined hash gates this step.

start.description: Commands run in parallel for the service.

afterStart.description: Commands run consecutively when the CLI exits (also on single-service stop/restart).

restartPolicy.description: Auto-heal a detached service that crashes at startup.

mode.description: on-failure relaunches on crash; never (default) does nothing.

scripts.description: Named scripts available for the service.

interactiveInput.description: Allow interactive stdin for this service.

autoSourceEnv.description: Toggle the auto `set -a; . <env>; set +a` prefix. Default on.

healthCheck.description: HTTP path used by `corgi status`. Falls back to TCP connect if unset.

profiles.description: Run profiles this service belongs to. `corgi run --profile P` runs only members of P plus their depends_on closure. No profiles = runs only when no --profile is passed.

databaseService.description: A database or backing service (postgres, redis, localstack, supabase, image, ...).

service_name.description: Override name (normally the map key is used).

host.description: Host used for DB_HOST. Defaults to localhost.

port2.description: Secondary port for drivers that expose two.

manualRun.description: If true, only runs when explicitly passed via --dbServices.

seedFromDbEnvPath.description: Path to an .env with source DB credentials to seed from.

seedFromFilePath.description: Path to a dump.sql file to seed from.

seedFromDb.description: Inline source DB credentials to seed from.

services.description: localstack driver: AWS services to enable.

queues.description: localstack driver: SQS queues to auto-create.

topics.description: localstack driver: SNS topics to auto-create.

subscriptions.description: localstack driver: SNS topic to SQS queue wiring.

parameters.description: localstack driver: SSM Parameter Store entries.

jwtSecret.description: supabase driver: override the stock JWT secret.

authUsers.description: supabase driver: auth users to seed on up.

configTomlPath.description: supabase driver: path to a config.toml copied on each init.

containerPort.description: image driver: container internal port. Defaults to port.

command.description: image driver: override container entrypoint args.

healthCheck.description: HTTP path used by `corgi status`. Falls back to TCP connect if unset.

profiles.description: Run profiles this db_service belongs to. Runs only when no --profile is passed, or when a selected service depends_on_db it.

required.description: A required tool that corgi checks for (and can install).

name.description: Override name (normally the map key is used).

install.description: Install commands run if the tool is missing.

optional.description: If true, prompt before installing. Default false.

checkCmd.description: Command used to check if the tool is installed. Defaults to the name.

name.description: Name of the service depended on.

envAlias.description: Prefix used for the injected env var.

suffix.description: Suffix appended to the resolved value.

forceUseEnv.description: Force resolving the value from the producer's env.

condition.description: Gate startup: wait until the dependency is ready (probe passes) or started (launched).

name.description: Name of the db_service depended on.

envAlias.description: Prefix added before injected DB_ credentials.

forceUseEnv.description: Force resolving the value from the producer's env.

condition.description: Gate startup: wait until the db is ready (probe passes) or started (launched).

manualRun.description: If true, the script is only run on demand.

copyEnvFromFilePath.description: Path to an .env to source for the script.

name.description: Runner name (empty = native, docker = run in Docker).

hostname.description: Public URL. Required when the tunnel block is present.

definitionPath.description: Path to a driver definition file (e.g. RabbitMQ definitions JSON).

queue.description: SQS queue name subscribed to the topic.

metadata.description: Map serialized to JSON for user_metadata.
